name: chr3_3p14_FHIT_region
description: 3p14.2 FHIT gene region encompassing the FRA3B common fragile site, the largest in the human genome. FRA3B and the surrounding SDs are hotspots for somatic deletions in epithelial cancers; the locus harbours flanking low-copy repeats that mediate rare germline rearrangements.

architecture.internal_structure: Common fragile site FRA3B inside FHIT intron 5; flanking SDs of 10-50 kb at ~92% identity; high density of late-replicating, AT-rich DNA prone to replication stress.

related_diseases: FHIT loss in epithelial cancers (lung, oesophagus)
